# Ai summary attempt

# Eyum 0.2 - Master TODO

Priority: [HIGH] / [MEDIUM] / [LOW] / [DONE]

---

## 0. Versioning & General
- [HIGH] Remember to always increment the version number while updating
- [MEDIUM] Add a `.gitignore` (node_modules, dist, .obsidian, .trash)
- [LOW] Clean up `.trash/` folder files from git history (~10 files)
- [LOW] Expand README.md with project description and build instructions
- [LOW] Add a license file

---

## 1. Races — Missing Racial Abilities & Subrace Files

[HIGH] `4.1 Races.md` lists ~90+ subraces with names/sizes/lifespans but has NO stat bonuses, affinity bonuses, or racial abilities defined.

Each race group needs its own `.md` file with per-subrace stats:
- Stat bonuses (e.g., +2 STR, +1 CON)
- Affinity bonuses (e.g., +3 Fire, -3 Water)
- Base speed
- Vision type (normal / low-light / darkvision)
- Tier 1 through Tier 10 racial abilities (each requires Bloodline Evolution)
- Starting languages

Subrace files missing (all are blank/absent):
- `Human and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Bugfolk and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Demon and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Elves and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Fishfolk and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Harpy and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Naga and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Shapeshifters and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Therian and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Tull and Subraces.md` — not written
- `Undead and Subraces.md` — not written

---

## 2. Monsters — Missing Statblocks & Organization

### 2A. Restructure Unique Monsters
- [HIGH] Resort unique monsters into many files sorted by type
- [HIGH] Add info like sounds the phoenix makes
- [HIGH] Add new types (Undead, Beast, etc.) and actually assign them
- [HIGH] Make all unique monsters (template exists but actual monsters are missing)

### 2B. Existing Monster Files — Many Are Stubs
Statblocks with only headers, need full content:

- Grootslang, Wight, Crypt Stalker, Soul Drinker — in trash
- Facehugger, Ghoul, Death Worm — stubs
- Kelpie, Kraken, Megalodon, Aspidochelone, Lusca, Serpent Whale, Deepcrawler — all stubs
- Chupacabra, Shoggoth, Camazotz, Beholder, Mimic — all stubs
- Dust Bunny, Will-o'-Wisp, Ember Sprite, Glimmer Moth, Pebble Toad, Whispercap, Frostling, Spark Mite — all stubs
- 7.3.6 Unique Monsters.md — was gutted (460 lines removed), needs new content
- Displacer Beast, Questing Beast — in trash

Complete files: Phoenix, Unicorn, Yeti, Cerberus, Roc, Catoblepas, Thunderbird, Warg, Bulette, Banshee, Gashadokuro, Aboleth

### 2C. Elemental Monster Variants
- Slimes: need Fire/Earth/Water/Air/Radiant/Necrotic variants + breeding tables
- Golems: need full elemental variants
- Dragons: need full elemental variants
- Chimeras: need more hybrid combinations

### 2D. Common Animals Entry
- [HIGH] Add monster entries for Common Animals (horses, pigs, cows, etc.)
- [HIGH] Add monster entries for Common Aquatic Animals (fish, etc.)
- These are the statblocks referenced in the Mounts table (Horse, Pony, Camel, etc.)

### 2E. Young Monster Rule
- [MEDIUM] Add a rule for monsters without a level / too young — probably half the stats of the basic statsheet

### 2F. Mounts & Familiars Section Rework
- [HIGH] Fix 1.5 Mounts and Familiars to reference actual monster statblocks instead of listing full stats inline
- Add a summary and reference to their pages
- Most monsters can be mounts but not all
- [MEDIUM] Add a "Temperament" column to each monster statblock: whether it can be a mount, companion, or is too aggressive

### 2G. Monster Drop Tables
- [MEDIUM] Verify 2.6 Materials.md has all required monster drop entries

---

## 3. New Skill Tree Paths for Monsters

- [MEDIUM] **Phoenix/Roc/Thunderbird path:** skills to breed them, level them up faster, use as companions, get feathers without hurting them
- [MEDIUM] **Unicorn/Rider/Warg path:** Instead of being monster-specific, make a tree for riding mounts with branches (Unicorns, Dragons)
- [MEDIUM] **Ghosts path:** skills for hunting ghosts and helping them move on
- [MEDIUM] **Aboleth/Fish/Aquatic path:** skills for breeding and taming fish/aboleth, breathing and moving underwater
- [MEDIUM] **Undead Hunter path:** dedicated tree for Undead monsters
- [MEDIUM] **Monster Hunter specifics:** needs more specific abilities based on actual monstrosity types, not just +1 damage
- [MEDIUM] **Spritemaster path:** magic based on using and summoning sprites for elements (elvish-style magic)
- [MEDIUM] **Companion skills** for Cerberus, Phoenix, etc.
- [MEDIUM] **Butcher skills** to make harvesting hide and meat from animals better

---

## 4. Spells — Missing Affinity Spell Trees

[HIGH] Only the base 7 affinities + Lightning, Ice/Cold, Vacuum, Poison have complete 5-tier spell trees. ~25+ advanced affinities have NO spells.

Complete trees: Fire, Earth, Water, Air, Radiant, Necrotic, Psychic, Lightning, Ice/Cold, Vacuum, Poison, Healing

Missing trees (need 5 levels each with upcasting):
- Steam, Magma, Dust, Mud, Nova, Solar, Hallowed, Starlight, Cursed, Ash, Blight, Toxin
- Bloodfire, Tremor, Deluge, Shatter, Sorrow, Chaos, Infernal, Metal, Torrent, Thunder
- Mirage, Warp, Storm, Frostfire, Glacial, Void, Obsidian, Quake, Corruption, Miasma, Gel
- Atomic, Eldritch

Also missing:
- Unique spells section (referenced in glossary but content unknown)
- More Pact Boon spells

---

## 5. New Affinities — Checklist for Each

[MEDIUM] For each new affinity/element, do the following:
1. Create a name
2. Edit the character sheets in the Character Reference and Building Your Character to include it
3. Edit the Affinities table to include it, add weaknesses, and make it the weakness of something
4. Add the affinity to the injury table (2.3 Injuries)
5. Add a condition it specializes in (needed for the injury table)
6. Add the 5 leveled spells for the affinity
7. Add the affinity and its spells to the character manager, plus a new build that specializes in it

---

- 5.2 Specific Deities.md — needs content review
- 5.3 Fighting Deities.md — content unknown, what does this mean mechanically?
- Alignment requirements are defined but specific per-deity alignments need listing
- Ancient Pacts.md, Fiendish Pacts.md, Godly Pacts.md — need pact tables filled for each deity

All need to exist or the build logs show "skipped" warnings.

### 8B. Character Visualization GUI
[MEDIUM] Per existing notes:
- Line graphs for each class showing stat progression per level
- Summary at the bottom of screen
- Hover highlights a line on the graph
- Toggle lines on/off by clicking a node in the bottom summary

- Settings tab with left sidebar showing settings .json files, editable like a text document
- Controls to rerun the generator, save/restore settings, restore previous version
- Real-time graph updates

---

## 9. Balance & Rules Issues

### 9A. Skill Point Economy
[MEDIUM] The skill tree's Scholar path gives extra SP but base game gives only 2 SP/level. Review SP economy across Levels 1-20 to ensure math works.

### 9B. Affinity Scaling at High Levels
[MEDIUM] Spell damage scales with Affinity Mod = (Affinity - 2) / 2. At 30+ affinity this creates quadratic damage scaling. Verify high-level monsters have proportional Vitality/Health.

### 9C. Rune Mana Surcharge
[MEDIUM] At runic circle sizes of 8+ effect runes, surcharge hits 400-650 mana per rune. A 10-rune circle costs 6,500+ mana. Review if this is reachable by max-level characters.

### 9D. Eldritch Horror Path Requirements
[LOW] Level 20 requires -2500+ karma but the base Karma system caps at -500. Sub-levels expand this but it requires massive grinding. Consider campaign feasibility.

---

- [LOW] "digression" should be "discretion" in multiple places
